detectors.description:

	- vault.setSeasonWeights(seasonId,agentIds,weightsWad) (src/SeasonSettler.sol#149)
	- agentNFA.updateReputation(tokenId,reputationDeltas[i]) (src/SeasonSettler.sol#157)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- resultsBySeason[s] = SeasonResult({leaderboardHash:leaderboardHash,merkleRoot:merkleRoot,settledAt:uint64(block.timestamp),exists:true}) (src/SeasonSettler.sol#162-167)
	SeasonSettler.resultsBySeason (src/SeasonSettler.sol#58) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SeasonSettler.resultsBySeason (src/SeasonSettler.sol#58)
	- SeasonSettler.submitSeasonResult(string,bytes32,bytes32,string[],uint256[],uint256[]) (src/SeasonSettler.sol#133-170)
